entry.title: Simplest Words Make The Most Complicated Sentences
entry.summary:
Author: LuKuXing

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,351Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: In a world where your soulmate's first words were written on your body, Bruce couldn't think of anything other than how much he appreciated his soulmate. Even if they weren't here. Soulmates were supposed to love you for what you were in your core. Would Bruce's soulmate love him as he is? Would they cherish him? Put up with him? Bruce was excited to meet his soulmate.

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part One
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 152,954Chapters: 13/14Kudos: 8

Summary: Five months after disappearing, Aven Davis is running out of time—and out of places to hide. A volatile implant is the only thing keeping the queen inside him dormant, sending him straight into Metropolis and unexpectedly back into Clark Kent’s orbit.Meanwhile, Bruce Wayne’s search for Aven takes a devastating turn, revealing betrayals that put every step he’s taken under Weyland-Yutani’s gaze. With the clock ticking and danger closing in, all three men are pulled toward a collision that will decide whether Aven survives long enough to ever come home. (Please Read Ashes In The Dark part one and Two before Reading.)

entry.title: I’ll Always Be Your Favorite
entry.summary:
Author: soiguessimgaynow

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,535Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: Bruce is used to lying. It’s second nature to him, a safeguard from revealing too much of himself, from having to depend on people that he will only end up losing. And Oliver is safe, always has been. So why does he keep toeing the line between getting everything should have wanted and losing something he always wished he could have.

entry.title: Perihelion
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,042Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 31

Summary: Two years after the gala. The orbit has found its shape. Dinners almost every night. Out three times a week. Saturdays are films. Sundays are newspapers and coffee and not checking the time. The mug is on the left side of the kitchen. The shoes are in the hallway. The arm is still there every morning. Every day is a good day. Bruce has questions he's been sitting on since the east wall. Clark has answers — some of them. The ones that are his to give. There's also the small matter of what Bruce says out loud at the Kerth ceremony. In front of witnesses. — Book Two of the Aphelion trilogy. Established relationship. Explicit throughout. The bruises are a love language now. Both directions.

entry.title: The Ring Between Darkness and Light
entry.summary:
Author: ShiningChimp

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,867Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Two masked legends rise from opposite worlds: Bruce Wayne, the brooding heir who forged himself into El Murciélago under the weight of grief, and Clark Kent, the bright‑hearted farm boy who becomes El Hombre de Acero with nothing but hope and raw strength. In the electrifying world of lucha libre, their rivalry becomes the stuff of myth—shadow against sunlight, precision against power. But beneath every clash, every stare, every brush of bodies in the ring, something deeper sparks. Neither man expects it. Neither man can stop it. And the fight that will define them is the one they never saw coming: falling in love.

entry.title: Face My Fears
entry.summary:
Author: MysticRose1992

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 88,991Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 3,866

Summary: During what Red Hood thought was just a routine check of all of the warehouses in his territory, making sure no new gang was going to start a gang war, he stumbles upon a scene that would haunt his nightmares. A Death Cult about to sacrifice a child that could be no older than 4. After dealing with the cult members, Jason finds himself the new caretaker of a 4 year old toddler that also happens to be able to turn invisible when startled. What could possibly go wrong?

entry.title: Don't Dream it's Over
entry.summary:
Author: NightTwink73

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,295Chapters: 13/20Kudos: 79

Summary: Eight months after Clark and Lois’s divorce, a breakup letter appears on Commissioner Gordon’s desk—addressed to Batman. But everything about it is wrong. Dear Batman,I can’t do this anymore. Whatever this is between us—it isn’t fair to either of us. You’ve always kept me at a distance, and I told myself I was okay with that, but I’m not.I need something real. Something you were never willing to give me.Don’t try to find me. I’m safe, and I won’t be coming back.I love you. Goodbye.— Superman As Bruce investigates, it quickly becomes clear: maybe the letter isn’t lying about Clark not coming back—and that’s a terrifying thought. Meanwhile, Clark wakes up in a dream life, living beside the man he’s never dared to love… trapped in a prison disguised as perfection.

entry.title: 5 times Clark covered for Cat, and 1 time he didn't
entry.summary:
Author: Nicealma

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,913Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 89

Summary: “What are you doing here? I thought you said you had plans?” Cat asked not able to look away from her friend who looked better than she had ever thought was possible. “I do.” He held up his own champagne glass at her as if that answered it. “Then what are you doing here?” she pressed. “He’s here as my date of course!” A deep but cheerful voice came behind Clark and Cat’s jaw dropped to the floor when Bruce-motherfucking-Wayne pulled his arm around Clark’s waist leaning into him.

entry.title: Nowhere to Land
entry.summary:
Author: bloodvvitch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,293Chapters: 16/25Kudos: 336

Summary: Bruce – recently injured and working a case that just won’t break – sees the tactical advantages of temporarily ‘dating’ Superman. Clark – who was almost too late to save his friend from a fatal fall – doesn’t understand what he’s signed up for. For two people who know each other so well, the World’s Finest just can’t manage to get on the same page.

entry.title: like grey skies (like a bird of paradise)
entry.summary:
Author: rainbow_nerds

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,392Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 410

Summary: He sighed to himself and downed the glass of champagne he'd been nursing—non-alcoholic, but enough to convince anyone who might give him a passing glance. He hated this, every time he had to do it. There was one surefire way to derail anyone who began wondering whether maybe Bruce Wayne was doing more than just donating funds to Batman.His tie hung loose around his neck, shirt unbuttoned to halfway down his chest, laughing too easily, pressing close to everyone he spoke to, whispering in ears, playing the part, until he turned and froze on the spot.Clark Kent, in his signature ill-fitting suit, stood holding a notebook and pen, staring at him with barely-concealed glee.Bruce cringed internally. He hated this. He especially hated when it had to be witnessed by someone he actually respected.or: After a Gala, Bruce and Clark end up in bed together. They're friends, just helping each other out, no strings attached. Which would be great, if Bruce hadn't been halfway to head-over-heels since the day they met.

entry.title: in a land of make believe (that don't believe in me)
entry.summary:
Author: snapdragonsuplex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,027Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 243

Summary: The kid blinks, then goes rigid. He slowly turns, and Clark– Clark’s stomach drops. Because he knows those eyes. He’s seen those eyes every day for the past nearly seven months. Those bright blue eyes that are an exact copy of his own. “... Conner?” He hears himself say. “Shit,” The kid– Conner– swears. “Dad’s gonna kill me.”------------------------An encounter with time-traveling robots brings a sixteen-year-old Conner to the present day. Clark and Bruce, predictably, are completely out of their depth.

entry.title: Love Is In The Air (anti-AI fic)
entry.summary:
Author: Frnkierosbigtoe

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 491Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: I've been seeing a lot of fics being written by AI now and its so devastating, like whatever happened to using your damn brain??? if you really cared about the fandom you were writing about you wouldn't have to even go to AI. Tsk Tsk Tsk. Basically I'm trying to prove how easy it is to write fanfic, it doesn't even have to be about anything it could just be total bs and people will click on it and smile at their read. Grow a brain. FUCK AI!!!!

entry.title: Worst First (Impression)
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,814Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 128

Summary: Years ago, in Smallville, Bruce made an impression on Clark. And not a good one. Now Bruce is back in his life—charming, relentless, and completely unaware of the damage he left behind all those years ago. But Clark hasn't forgotten. And while Batman and Superman learn how to trust each other, their civilian identities are busy getting everything wrong.

entry.title: What Would You Trade the Pain For?
entry.summary:
Author: theFamousLivingDead

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,759Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 28

Summary: D: Got a job for you. On one condition?B: What condition?D: Clark tags along.B: No.D: Bruce. It's the only condition.B: Send Hal. Barry. Anyone else. After a disastrous Justice League mission, Clark Kent and Bruce Wayne are at each other's throats. Literally. They both mean well, but cannot appreciate each other's bothersome influences. When Lex Luthor escapes to a town where the Justice League can't follow, Diana calls upon Bruce to go undercover. But he's not allowed to go on his own. Or.. Bruce and Clark get a chance to mend whatever relationship they have by playing pretend and who knows, they might end up being great actors after all!
